tasks.check: deno task build:collector && deno check src/main.ts
tasks.dev: deno task build:collector && deno desktop --hmr --no-check src/main.ts
tasks.build: deno task build:collector && deno desktop --no-check --allow-env=HOME,MBD_DOWNLOAD_ROOT,MBD_AUTO_VERIFY --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --unstable-kv --icon assets/icon.icns --output 'Media Bulk Downloads.app' src/main.ts && bash scripts/set-app-metadata.sh 'Media Bulk Downloads.app'
